errors.name: inconsistent-overload
errors.description:
Implementation signature `(self: Self@NamedArray, axes: Axis | Mapping[str, int | None] | Sequence[AxisSelector] | str) -> Axis | Mapping[str, int] | Sequence[Axis]` does not accept all arguments that overload signature `(self: Self@NamedArray, axis: Axis | str) -> Axis` accepts
  Positional parameter name mismatch: got `axes`, want `axis`

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `NamedArray.__eq__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner
  `NamedArray.__eq__` has type `(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> Literal[False] | NamedArray | Unknown`, which is not assignable to `(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool`, the type of `object.__eq__`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def __eq__(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
  found:    def __eq__(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> Literal[False] | NamedArray | Unknown: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `NamedArray.__eq__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner

errors.name: bad-override
errors.description:
Class member `NamedArray.__ne__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner
  `NamedArray.__ne__` has type `(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> NamedArray | Unknown`, which is not assignable to `(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool`, the type of `object.__ne__`
  Signature mismatch:
  expected: def __ne__(self: NamedArray, value: object, /) -> bool: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
  found:    def __ne__(self: NamedArray, other: Unknown) -> NamedArray | Unknown: ...
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ return type
                                         |
                                         parameters
errors.concise_description: Class member `NamedArray.__ne__` overrides parent class `object` in an inconsistent manner

  found:    def get_metrics(self: ArrowFlightServer) -> WeightTransferServerMetrics: ...
